name: Smoked Turkey Bagel Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 2 Slices Tomato Or Green Bell Pepper Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 2 slices of smoked turkey breast on the bottom half of a bagel.
2. Add 2 slices of tomato or green bell pepper rings and 1 slice of cheddar cheese.
3. Place the top half of the bagel on the sandwich.
4. Cut the sandwich in half with a knife.
5. Lay a sheet of wax paper (12-inch square) on a plate.
6. Place the sandwich halves in the center of the wax paper.
7. Fold one side of the wax paper over the sandwich, bringing it to the opposite side and folding down.
8. Repeat with the other side of the wax paper.
9. Fold the ends of the wax paper under the sandwich, sealing all sides.
10. Place the wrapped sandwich in a microwave-safe dish.
11. Heat on HIGH for 30 seconds to 1 minute, or until the sandwich is hot.
12. Serve and enjoy your Smoked Turkey Bagel Sandwich.
Makes 1 serving.
